channel.title: SPARQL on Christian Mahnke
channel.description: Recent content in SPARQL on Christian Mahnke

item.title: Blog metadata visualised
item.author: mail@christianmahnke.de (Christian Mahnke)
item.description: About a year ago, I tried visualising the blog content…

item.title: Querying blog metadata via SPARQL
item.author: mail@christianmahnke.de (Christian Mahnke)
item.description: Since the start of 2025, I have been recording additional metadata for the posts on this blog.

item.title: Simple data enrichment with Wikidata
item.author: mail@christianmahnke.de (Christian Mahnke)
item.description: Found while tidying up the browser tabs…

item.title: Wikidata Links in Hugo
item.author: mail@christianmahnke.de (Christian Mahnke)
item.description: Another step towards easier searchability of the site…

item.title: Data Containers
item.author: mail@christianmahnke.de (Christian Mahnke)
item.description: Even if it is not necessarily the intended use case, Docker makes it very easy to package large amounts of data with applications for simplified provisioning (such as APIs). This can be particularly helpful if, for example, standardisation data from different sources is to be merged for data enrichment.
